targets.name: code-and-config
targets.restoreMethod: git revert/cherry-pick plus gated Cloudflare deploy

targets.name: cloudflare-pages-deployment
targets.restoreMethod: rollback to known-good Pages deployment id

targets.name: cloudflare-workers
targets.sourceOfTruth: GitHub worker source and Cloudflare worker versions
targets.rpo: latest committed worker source plus latest deployed version id
targets.restoreMethod: redeploy committed worker or rollback worker version

targets.name: cloudflare-kv-metadata
targets.backupOwner: Cloudflare KV export into controlled restore artifact
targets.rpo: 24 hours for MVP metadata after first production release
targets.rto: 4 hours for small namespace restore dry-run
targets.restoreMethod: restore selected prefixes into preview KV namespace, verify counts, then promote only after approval
targets.sensitiveHandling: never commit exports; never publish live sessions or OAuth state

targets.name: idrive-e2-user-objects
targets.rpo: object write acknowledged by IDrive e2
targets.rto: 4 hours for small user restore test; depends on object count
targets.restoreMethod: verify object list, checksums and signed GET/PUT flow; restore user-scoped objects only

blockingRisks: no IDrive e2 signed object restore test
static files served as SPA HTML
Cloudflare Pages auto-deploy bypasses release gate
production data stored in legacy SQL or server filesystem
